original_prompt: Create a new folder called 'scratch_test', inside it create a file 'calc.py' with a function that calculates factorial of 5 and prints it. Then run the python script using terminal.

tasks.title: Create scratch_test directory
tasks.description: Run command to create a new directory named 'scratch_test' in the current working directory.

tasks.title: Create calc.py with factorial function
tasks.description: Inside the 'scratch_test' folder, create a file named 'calc.py'. Write a Python function that computes the factorial of 5 and prints the result. The script should call this function when executed.

tasks.title: Execute calc.py script
tasks.description: Change into the 'scratch_test' directory and run the Python script 'calc.py' using the command 'python calc.py' or 'python3 calc.py' depending on system availability.
